questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains a Microsoft Teams channel named Channel1. Channel1 contains research and development documents. You plan to implement Microsoft 365 Copilot for the subscription. You need to prevent the contents of files stored in Channel1 from being included in answers generated by Copilot and shown to unauthorized users. What should you use?
options: B. Microsoft Purview insider risk management
questions.explanation: To prevent the contents of files stored in Channel1 from being included in Microsoft 365 Copilot responses and ensure unauthorized users cannot access them, you should use Microsoft Purview Sensitivity Labels.
questions.translation_es: Tiene una suscripción a Microsoft 365 E5 que contiene un canal de Microsoft Teams denominado Channel1. Channel1 contiene documentos de investigación y desarrollo. Planea implementar Microsoft 365 Copilot para la suscripción. Debe evitar que el contenido de los archivos almacenados en Channel1 se incluya en las respuestas generadas por Copilot y se muestre a usuarios no autorizados. ¿Qué debería utilizar?

questions.text: You are implementing Microsoft Purview Information Protection for a financial institution. Which component should you use to automatically discover and classify credit card numbers across all SharePoint Online sites?
questions.explanation: Auto-labeling policies for sensitivity labels allow you to automatically classify data at rest in SharePoint Online based on sensitive information types like credit card numbers.
questions.translation_es: Está implementando Microsoft Purview Information Protection para una institución financiera. ¿Qué componente debe usar para detectar y clasificar automáticamente los números de tarjetas de crédito en todos los sitios de SharePoint Online?
